response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:06: Intro/Talk. 2. 00:06-00:59: 'Okey Dokey' by ReGLOSS performed. 3. 00:59-04:59: Conversational segment. Lyrics for 'Okey Dokey' were retrieved from training knowledge as general search results were for different songs.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting by the Hololive VTuber group ReGLOSS, followed by a live performance of their original song 'Okey Dokey', and concluding with post-performance chatter.

scenes.description: The members of the VTuber group ReGLOSS wave to the audience and introduce themselves on stage.
The group performs their original song 'Okey Dokey'. The performers dance while singing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, 予想最高のDays
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, 私、あなた、みんなのFavorite
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, 突き進め Okey Dokey
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, このままでいいのさ Everybody!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, the best days I imagined
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, my, your, everyone's favorites
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, let's keep going, Okey Dokey
Okey Dokey, Okey Dokey, in this moment, let's go, everybody!

scenes.description: The performers engage in post-performance conversation with the audience.
